001package net.pl3x.guithium.api;
002
003import net.pl3x.guithium.api.network.NetworkHandler;
004import net.pl3x.guithium.api.player.PlayerManager;
005import org.jetbrains.annotations.NotNull;
006import org.slf4j.Logger;
007import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
008
009/**
010 * The Guithium API.
011 */
012public interface Guithium {
013    /**
014     * The identifier for this mod.
015     */
016    String MOD_ID = "guithium";
017
018    /**
019     * The protocol version.
020     * <p>
021     * This is used to ensure client and server can correctly talk to each other.
022     */
023    int PROTOCOL = 1;
024
025    /**
026     * Guithium's internal logger.
027     * <p>
028     * <u>For internal use</u>. Please use your own logger.
029     */
030    Logger logger = LoggerFactory.getLogger(Guithium.MOD_ID);
031
032    /**
033     * Get the Guithium API instance.
034     *
035     * @return Instance of Guithium API
036     */
037    @NotNull
038    static Guithium api() {
039        return Provider.api();
040    }
041
042    /**
043     * Get the network handler instance.
044     *
045     * @return Network handler
046     */
047    @NotNull
048    NetworkHandler getNetworkHandler();
049
050    /**
051     * Get the player manager instance.
052     *
053     * @return Player manager
054     */
055    @NotNull
056    PlayerManager getPlayerManager();
057
058    /**
059     * The Guithium instance provider.
060     * <p>
061     * <u>For internal use</u>.
062     */
063    final class Provider {
064        static Guithium api;
065
066        private Provider() {
067            // Empty constructor to pacify javadoc lint
068        }
069
070        @NotNull
071        private static Guithium api() {
072            return Provider.api;
073        }
074    }
075}
